title: Add Anchors to Monday's Workdocs
excerpt:

posts.author: jailynnhoops (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
Similar to websites and the ability to redirect users specifically to a section of a website, I would love to see that released for Workdocs.

It could lead to a nice use case for when we are referencing public docs or when there are really long documents that you would like to anchor back to a previous section in the document.
